title: Villagerless Lava Chicken
description: This resource pack removes the villager noises from the lava chicken music disc
body:
Does anyone else think that villager "hmm-ing" in the lava chicken music disc sounds super stupid?  Well guess what, I removed it!  Ok actually this guy removed it, and I put it in a resource pack.  
if it doesn't play, get this, but put my pack above it in the list: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lava-chicken-music-disc-not-playing

This guy made the music, not me: https://youtu.be/iaJf4BLOAuI
